description: Native-only standing pool is active with two tasks submitted to code-reviewer and security-reviewer.
assertion: pool is active, multi_model is false, two reviewers, two tasks submitted

description: security-reviewer finishes its task normally, returning 3 findings.
assertion: security-reviewer completed with 3 findings; no error

description: code-reviewer crashes mid-task. Its process terminated unexpectedly.
assertion: code-reviewer status is failed with error indicating crash

description: standing-pool-submitter returns a failed envelope to the host session. The envelope carries the reviewer_crashed error code and metadata. The submitter does NOT invoke recovery itself.

error.message: Reviewer code-reviewer did not complete: process terminated

assertion: envelope status is failed; error.code is reviewer_crashed; error.message names code-reviewer; submitter does not own recovery

description: The submitting command's host session detects reviewer_crashed, extracts 'code-reviewer' from error.message, and spawns a fresh native code-reviewer via the Task tool. The submitter does not own this step.
assertion: recovery invoked by host session, not submitter; reviewer name extracted from error.message; Task tool used for spawn

description: The freshly spawned native code-reviewer completes successfully, returning 2 findings attributed as native-recovery.
assertion: fresh code-reviewer completed with 2 findings; source_type is native-recovery

description: Surviving security-reviewer findings (3) are appended with recovered code-reviewer findings (2). Stages 3–6 of consolidation are NOT re-run. Full reconsolidation is NOT run. Total is 5.
assertion: total = surviving + recovered = 5; no full reconsolidation; Stages 3–6 not run

description: A unified report is emitted. The report header contains the verbatim FR-MMT24 step-5 note naming the recovered reviewer. Recovered findings are attributed as native-recovery. Total findings in report is 5.
report_header_contains: Note: reviewer code-reviewer was recovered from a pool failure.
assertion: report header verbatim per FR-MMT24 step 5; recovered findings attributed native-recovery; total findings 5
